title: AndesName
description: Hides nicknames above players, useful for RP servers
body:
# AndesName

This plugin will help your server become a **better** version of itself.
It will help you develop roleplay on your server more effectively by hiding nicknames.

## Functions
Currently, it has a simple function: when you right-click on a player, their nickname is displayed in the ActionBar.

The plugin will be actively developed in the near future.

## Commands
/andesname reload - plugin reload
